context: Tests whether the agent follows the profile-first performance investigation workflow: profiling with :fprof or :eprof before benchmarking, verifying the bottleneck is confirmed in the profiling output, writing a comparative benchmark with multiple input sizes, validating improvement by handling noise, and saving a baseline with a regression threshold.

checklist.name: Uses :fprof or :eprof
checklist.description: The investigation plan includes profiling code that calls :fprof or :eprof (either atom appears in the profiling section)

checklist.name: Profile before benchmark
checklist.description: The plan's profiling step is presented as the FIRST step — the plan does not jump directly to writing a Benchee benchmark without profiling first

checklist.name: Bottleneck confirmation step
checklist.description: The plan explicitly describes verifying that the profiling output names the expected slow function before proceeding to write benchmarks

checklist.name: Multiple input sizes
checklist.description: The benchmark template includes an `inputs:` map (or equivalent) with at least 3 differently-sized inputs (e.g., small, medium, large)

checklist.name: Noise threshold handling
checklist.description: The plan describes running additional benchmark iterations (at least 3 more) when results are within a small percentage difference, to rule out variance

checklist.name: Saves to bench/baseline.json
checklist.description: The plan explicitly mentions saving benchmark results to bench/baseline.json

checklist.name: Regression threshold stated
checklist.description: The plan states a numeric regression threshold of greater than 10% for detecting performance regressions

checklist.name: Warmup configured
checklist.description: The benchmark template includes a warmup: option in the Benchee.run/2 configuration

checklist.name: Benchmark run time configured
checklist.description: The benchmark template includes a time: option set to 10 (seconds) in the Benchee.run/2 configuration

checklist.name: Compares two implementations
checklist.description: The benchmark template benchmarks both slow_path/1 and fast_path/1 (or at least two named alternative implementations) in a single Benchee.run/2 call

checklist.name: Console formatter with comparison
checklist.description: The benchmark template includes the Benchee.Formatters.Console formatter with comparison: true
